creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
I run into some plist issues. Would you check this?

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/examples/NoSQL/R-query-example.R
Error: Missing: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/examples/NoSQL/README
Error: Missing: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/examples/NoSQL/admin.ms
Error: Missing: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/examples/NoSQL/database.ms
Error: Missing: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/examples/NoSQL/install-database-and-users

===> Error: Plist issues found.

Thanks!
